case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. ALL AMERICAN AUTO COLLISION INC. et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $178.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ALL AMERICAN AUTO COLLISION INC. ARBELAEZ, RAUL

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALL AMERICAN AUTO COLLISION INC. ARBELAEZ, RAUL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: UNITEC DBT2 PNEUMATIC JACK, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $7,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $16,250.12 DAMAGES, $1,950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $178.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,378.12, INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $351.55, FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $18,729.67. CLAIM AND DELIVERY JUDGMENT...............SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-05-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT AND AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR FEB-17-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-17-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION MOTION TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR IN JUDGMENT AND AMEND JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. KEVIN M. MCCARTHY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
ORDER CORRECTING CLERICAL ERROR AND AMENDING JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC (LAST NAME FROM ARBALAEZ TO ARBELAEZ)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALL AMERICAN AUTO COLLISION INC. ARBELAEZ, RAUL $16,250.12 PRINCIPAL, $1,950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $351.55 INTEREST, $178.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,729.67, (PLAINTIFF ALSO AWARDED OWNERSHIP OF THE FOLLOWING LEASED EQUIPMENT: ONE BREWCO MAX RACK PLUS FRAME MACHINE; ONE UNITEC DBT2 PNEUMATIC JACK. SEE SCANNED DOC FOR COMPLETE DETAILS
